description: UserdataHub, branded in the docs as DataHub, is a web platform for managing telematics applications, user groups, users, trips, inspections, and related mobile SDK data. Its public documentation focuses on account setup, access management, and obtaining credentials for SDK/API integrations.
summary: userdatahub.com exposes a documented developer onboarding portal for DataHub credentials, but I could not confirm any public HTTP/REST, GraphQL, MCP, or CLI integration surface on userdatahub.com itself from the available docs.
